sources.title: Die Krone von Arkus (Familienfilm in voller Länge, kompletter Film auf Deutsch, ganzer Film) *HD*

metadata.Plot: Fear and terror dictate the everyday life of Arkus. Schiija, the evil queen of the city, fossilizes the residents into stone whenever she wants to demonstrate her dark power. Once a year she forces all inhabitants of Arkus to donate gifts to their queen at the gifts day. One week before this event Saraja, a homeless girl, finds an astonishing message. The letter are as follows: "Be here at midnight." At exactly twelve o'clock that day she comes back as the arcane message told her. Jono, the leader of the thieves with magical hands, is already waiting for her. Shortly before she was listening to his narration of the legend of the young boy Morius with the other members of the thieves with magical hands. Many years ago Morius has stolen a stone of Schiijas crown whereupon she turned him into stone. From this time on he is standing there as a fixed sculpture - no opportunity to talk or even talk. But the secret behind this evilness is, that he's still alive in his lithic prison. Schiija threatens him to transform the whole city of Arkus into a absolutely clean and diamond city. Only his release could prohibit this plan. Saraja and Jono both want to help Morius, but Saraja is absolutely not interested in working together with Jono. So she alone gets to work to overcome the three obstacles: The most beautiful dress, the longest candy cane and the most lovely ring should own, who could then be able to overwhelm the evil queen. Saraja works for the tailor Géraldine and fabricates the most beautiful dress. Not till the end she realizes, that Jono clandestine helped her a lot. For this reason she is really appreciative and decides to cooperate with Jono in order to help Morius. At once Lyra, a member of the thieves with magical hands who adores Jono, is jealous and angry and therefore in short decides to move to the queen with all members of their group. Fast they realize that diamonds and presents don't replace their friend Jono. But how can they get free again? At the same time Saraja and Jono produce the longest candy cane at the bakery. They are close to master the challenges, when they get caught by the old baker Menni. During a chase they escape - to fall into the next trap - set by Jonos friend Lyris. It seems as if she is totally submissive towards the queen, but in reality she makes use of her intelligence and keeps on the right side of Schiija in order to covertly plan their escape.
metadata.Actors: Lukas Jantzen, Anna-Lena Sender, Marit Persiel
